name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Help us finish the month strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
We have some major projects in the works right now
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a50d/bed43eb/97ec2057/75fb75bd/3456991192/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
We have some major projects in the works right now. We're building local groups like in the former GM town of Lordstown, Ohio, and running a campaign to pressure the DCCC into ending its Blacklist, which is already harming progressive primary challengers to House incumbents. **But right now, we're just hours away from our fundraising deadline for the month - and we're counting on your support to hit our goal.**
[**We 're building a political revolution to elect progressive leaders up AND down the ballot, win Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, and transform the Democratic Party. Donate $5 right now to build it with us.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a50d/bed43eb/97ec2057/75fb75bc/3456991192/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-april19?refcode=em190430d&noskip=true")
This month, Our Revolution went on the road to Lordstown, Ohio, where the GM plant that manufactured the Chevrolet Cruze recently shut down, costing the community almost 1,500 good jobs. We started a local group led by laid-off GM worker Chuckie Denison - who was featured in Bernie's campaign ad "Lordstown Tough" - and are organizing more groups with local leaders like Chuckie to win the Midwest in 2020.
At the same time, we delivered over 30,000 petitions to DCCC Chair Cheri Bustos calling for an end to the DCCC Blacklist. This policy hurts progressive primary challengers to Democratic House incumbents from assembling the teams they need to win. We're on our way to rolling it back so that the next generation of leaders can compete to represent their districts like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ro Khanna, and many other candidates-turned-Congresspeople before them.
**[Make a $5 donation before midnight to help us hit our April goal. With your support we will be able to continue forming local groups, transforming the Democratic Party, and paving the way toward the transformative progressive policies we're fighting for together.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a50d/bed43eb/97ec2057/75fb75bc/3456991192/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-april19?refcode=em190430d&noskip=true")**
Thanks for stepping up before our deadline - we can't do this without you.
In Solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a50d/bed43eb/97ec2057/75fb75bc/3456991192/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-april19?refcode=em190430d&noskip=true")**

name: Bernie 2020
subject: Can you make a contribution today to stand with Bernie? We have until tonight at midnight to hit this month’s fundraising goal, and we are still a bit behind.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1222%2E150750%2EhGjqPI)

Friends -
We are quickly closing in on tonight's end-of-month fundraising deadline we've set for our campaign. But we're still pacing a bit behind where we need to be to hit our goal.
Here's the truth: Bernie is one of the only candidates running for president who doesn't ask mega-donors to bankroll our campaign. Small-dollar donations are how we are funding our movement – and so far this month our average is around $16.
But that means it takes a _**lot_** more donations for us to keep pace with our opponents who cash $2,800 max-out checks from the wealthy.
Every donation matters. And each one made before midnight tonight will help reach our April fundraising goal while sending a powerful message that our campaign is the best prepared to win this election.

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: I'm running for Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header]
Dear Friend –
It’s official: today I’m officially announcing that I’m running for Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat in 2020, and I would be honored to have you with me as we begin this campaign together.
The United States government is the greatest civic achievement known to mankind, but these days, Washington isn’t working for us. The current power structure is corrupt and our so-called leaders are more addicted to the fight than solving problems. As a mayor, I’ve delivered for the people and I’m running for Senate to take on that corrupt power structure and make government work for us once again.
Now is your chance to become a Founding Donor of our campaign. Chip in now, and help us kick off this campaign to win back Georgia and the Senate majority in 2020. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050119-exp&noskip=true]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate $3 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050119-exp&amount=3&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050119-exp&amount=10&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050119-exp&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050119-exp&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Or, donate another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050119-exp]
I’m excited to work with you and our fantastic team as we build a new future for Georgia and our country – one where our government functions instead of endlessly fighting.
It’s a long road ahead, and the stakes could not be higher -- not only for Georgia but our entire country. The fact is that if we’re going to have a Democratic majority in the Senate, we have to win this race. People all over the state are ready to come together to elect new leadership, because it’s clear that we’ve been sending the wrong people to Washington, people who would rather be part of that broken system than take it on.
Washington today is crowded with people intent on dividing us – who would tear us apart rather than bring us together. It’s time we take on that entrenched, backward thinking, and create a new playbook that will improve people’s lives and get results.
I’m an eighth generation Georgian with roots all across this state. Throughout my career, first as an attorney and then as Mayor of Columbus, I’ve been willing to take on bullies and stand up for justice. And, if you send me to Washington, that’s exactly what I intend to do for the people of Georgia.
Say you’re with me by chipping in today, and let’s get started on this journey together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em050119-exp&noskip=true]
Yours truly,
Teresa

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tomorrow we celebrate the National Day of Prayer
body:
| | Peter, Since 1952, the President of the United States has set aside an annual day for prayer, and in 1988, Ronald Reagan designated the first Thursday in May as the day we observe the National Day of Prayer. Tomorrow, millions across our nation will simultaneously and extraordinarily pause to acknowledge God and seek Him in prayer. Dr. Ronnie Floyd, President of the National Day of Prayer says, "There is no great movement of God that has ever occurred that does not begin with the extraordinary prayer of God's people." We often forget that America was birthed out of fervent prayer. After weeks of negotiations at the 1787 Constitutional Convention delegates began returning home. The outcome of the convention looked grim, and that’s when Benjamin Franklin called on the delegates to pray. _“I have lived, sir, a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth – that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without His notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without His aid?

“We have been assured, sir, in the Sacred Writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House, they labor in vain that build it.’ I firmly believe this; and I also believe that without His concurring aid we shall succeed in this political building no better than the builders of Babel. ... I therefore beg leave to move that henceforth prayers imploring the assistance of Heaven, and its blessings on our deliberations, be held in this Assembly every morning before we proceed to business.”_
–Benjamin Franklin Today, at a time when the moral underpinnings of our society seem to be unraveling, unborn lives no longer valued, marriage redefined, gender misunderstood, absolute truth rejected - the most powerful thing we can do is to fall to our knees and seek the Lord in prayer. We encourage you to pray tomorrow for your community, for our nation, and your elected leaders. clean_body: | | Peter, Since 1952, the President of the United States has set aside an annual day for prayer, and in 1988, Ronald Reagan designated the first Thursday in May as the day we observe the National Day of Prayer. Tomorrow, millions across our nation will simultaneously and extraordinarily pause to acknowledge God and seek Him in prayer. Dr. Ronnie Floyd, President of the National Day of Prayer says, "There is no great movement of God that has ever occurred that does not begin with the extraordinary prayer of God's people." We often forget that America was birthed out of fervent prayer. After weeks of negotiations at the 1787 Constitutional Convention delegates began returning home. The outcome of the convention looked grim, and that’s when Benjamin Franklin called on the delegates to pray. “I have lived, sir, a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth – that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without His notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without His aid? “We have been assured, sir, in the Sacred Writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House, they labor in vain that build it.’ I firmly believe this; and I also believe that without His concurring aid we shall succeed in this political building no better than the builders of Babel. ... I therefore beg leave to move that henceforth prayers imploring the assistance of Heaven, and its blessings on our deliberations, be held in this Assembly every morning before we proceed to business.” –Benjamin Franklin Today, at a time when the moral underpinnings of our society seem to be unraveling, unborn lives no longer valued, marriage redefined, gender misunderstood, absolute truth rejected - the most powerful thing we can do is to fall to our knees and seek the Lord in prayer. We encourage you to pray tomorrow for your community, for our nation, and your elected leaders. to help you get started and visit the to see prayer events taking place near you. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Don’t Call it a Coup. Venezuelans Have a Right to Replace an Oppressive, Toxic Regime.
body:
"Tuesday’s uprising is not a ‘coup attempt,’ as the Maduro regime, echoed by too many people abroad, calls it." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d04a904199&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Don’t Call it a Coup. Venezuelans Have a Right to Replace an Oppressive, Toxic Regime.**

“Tuesday’s uprising is not a ‘coup attempt,’ as the Maduro regime, echoed by too many people abroad, calls it. Rather, it is the latest in a series of legitimate and, for the most part, nonviolent efforts by Venezuelans, both civilian and military, to throw off an oppressive, toxic regime so that they can freely elect a legitimate government,” _The Washington Post_ editorial board writes.

“Supporters of freedom and democracy should stand in solidarity with Mr. Guaidó and the many thousands of Venezuelans now bravely asserting their rights.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d431041601&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** **Watch** : [A message to all the patriotic citizens of Venezuela](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4213ead0f4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Venezuelan Interim President Juan Guaido “and his supporters are now trying to save their country from Maduro’s misrule. If the military does indeed defect this week, forcing Maduro to leave, Guaido has pledged to quickly prepare Venezuela for real elections,” Eli Lake writes in _[Bloomberg](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7dfd297eba&e=3ee4985eea)_ _._ “That’s not an anti-democratic coup. It’s a democratic rescue mission.”
---
|
---
| “Bad enough that The New York Times published what one of the paper’s own columnists called a ‘despicable’ cartoon containing so many anti-Jewish images that ‘the only thing missing was a dollar sign,’” the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8bbe4d7b6&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “Worse, it took more than 24 hours of controversy before the Times saw fit to apologize — after first offering a feeble ‘editor’s note’ citing only ‘an error in judgment.’”
---
|
---
| “Border Patrol agents stationed on the U.S-Mexico border arrested a group of 424 people who illegally crossed into New Mexico on Tuesday morning. Authorities said the group is the largest ever apprehended at once,” Anna Giaritelli reports in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f50393b1a&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Border Patrol's parent agency, Customs and Border Protection, said the groups are not traveling to the U.S. on their own, they are paying human smugglers and cartels to get them into the U.S.”
---
|
---
| “Fifty years ago the U.S. led humanity to the moon,” Acting Defense Secretary Patrick Shanahan writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0216490a33&e=3ee4985eea)_. “To borrow the words of the plaque left on the lunar surface by Apollo 11: ‘We came in peace for all mankind.’ China and Russia make no such claim. Until they credibly commit to such a course, we must ensure our nation’s military remains the most advanced on Earth—and above it.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=44816776e7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8bb26e1cc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=480a62d009)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What are you doing for freedom today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
When I was little, my father would look at us kids across the top of his newspaper, sip his coffee, and say, "What are you going to do for freedom today?" He wasn't kidding. He wanted to know what we were going to do to make the world better.
That notion -- that question about freedom -- is something that I carried with me in the State Senate and as Governor, and that I think of often now as a U.S. Senator.
Unfortunately, making our country one that gives every hardworking American the chance to get ahead and stay ahead isn't as simple or easy as any of us would like.
Setting future generations up for success means a real commitment to combating climate change, protecting Planned Parenthood, preserving our right to affordable health care, and ensuring that everyone has access to a quality education.
This fight for fundamental rights - for helping families succeed -- is what I'm doing for freedom today, and every day. And that is, in no small part, because of your continued support. Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Hi there, When I was little, my father would look at us kids across the top of his newspaper, sip his coffee, and say, "What are you going to do for freedom today?" He wasn't kidding. He wanted to know what we were going to do to make the world better. That notion -- that question about freedom -- is something that I carried with me in the State Senate and as Governor, and that I think of often now as a U.S. Senator. Unfortunately, making our country one that gives every hardworking American the chance to get ahead and stay ahead isn't as simple or easy as any of us would like. Setting future generations up for success means a real commitment to combating climate change, protecting Planned Parenthood, preserving our right to affordable health care, and ensuring that everyone has access to a quality education. This fight for fundamental rights - for helping families succeed -- is what I'm doing for freedom today, and every day. And that is, in no small part, because of your continued support. Thank you. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan P.S. -- "" ""

name: Kamala Harris
subject: We reached our goal last night around 10 p.m.
body:
I want to reach out personally to say thank you. With your
help, we reached our April fundraising goal last night at around 10 p.m.
on the East Coast.

Every time we set a fundraising target, it’s not arbitrary: whether we
reach our fundraising targets has a real, tangible impact on the direction
of our campaign. When we reach our targets, we can fully fund our
strategic programs. If we fall short, we run the risk of needing to cut
funding from important parts of our budget.

Fortunately, each time we’ve set a goal, our grassroots team has stepped
up in a real way to ensure we don’t fall short.

Later today, our campaign’s leadership team and our department heads are
gathering for a team retreat where they’ll discuss strategy and our budget
for the coming months.

Because we hit our April target, the conversations during today’s retreat
will be about how we can spend our campaign’s resources diligently --
instead of looking for areas where we can cut. It will keep us focused on
the most important task at hand: campaigning hard and connecting with more
voters across the country.

None of this could be possible without you and your contributions. Whether
you gave $1, $10, or $100, every ounce of support you give helps us build
a winning campaign.

Thanks again for all that you do.

— Kamala Harris

Kamala Harris is running a grassroots campaign for president, rejecting
all contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists and relying
100% on people to power our historic campaign.

Peter,
Show me a supposedly "unfixable" problem in Washington, and I'll show you the political corruption standing in the way. That's why I just rolled out my Clean Elections Plan--a bold reform to attack political corruption at its core.
When the NRA wants to prevent gun reform, they funnel money into the campaigns of candidates nationwide to make sure they _don 't_ vote for commonsense gun reform. Insurance companies do the same to block Medicare for All and prevent us from guaranteeing health care as a right, not a privilege. The story is the same with polluters. And drug companies. And oil companies. The list goes on.
The only answer is to get corporate money out of politics and reform the system.
**My Clean Elections Plan would change the way Washington works and make your voice as loud as the Koch Brothers '.**
**[Add your name and join my call for clean elections to get corporate money out of politics. By leveling the playing field, our democracy will thrive, and we will protect against the dysfunction that's poisoning Washington.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97716a/2ae112ef/6e4d142d/357c37dd/474463468/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwNzMtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/kg2020-clean-elections?source=jtk3073-ja-gfp-nd")**

Changing the way we fund elections and attacking political corruption is the only way to accomplish any of our boldest, most progressive policies and truly help working families. The Green New Deal, Medicare for All, lowering prescription drug prices, common sense gun reform--accomplishing any of this depends on weakening the corrosive effect of money in politics.
**Join me in calling for clean elections in this country to return power to the people and take it out of the hands of politicians beholden to their donors --add your name:**

**[https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/kg2020-clean-elections](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97716a/2ae112ef/6e4d142d/357c37dd/474463468/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwNzMtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/kg2020-clean-elections?source=jtk3073-ja-gfp-nd")**

Kirsten

name: Maria Brewer
subject: "Stay out of politics."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

Republican House Speaker Glen Casada told a group of prominent Tennessee businesses to stay out of politics after they chose to speak out against his party's hateful anti-LGBT legislation.

"They should take care of stockholders and not get to much involved in politics," Casada told The Tennessean.

This isn't anything new. We know Glen Casada wants to silence dissenting voices, but we won't let him.

Whether he's refusing to allow Democrats to speak during House floor debates, removing peaceful protestors from committee rooms, or telling Tennessee's business community to 'stay in your lane', we're holding him accountable and fighting back.

Can you pitch in today to help combat these attempts to drown out opposing viewpoints and continue the fight against Republicans' Slate of Hate?

Your past contribution helped cast light on Republicans' Slate of Hate, and now Tennesseans and business leaders are united behind our LGBTQ brothers and sisters -- but it's not over.

By pitching in today, you will help amplify the voices of Democrats across the state by growing our county parties, supporting our affiliated groups and launching new caucus organizations.

Thank you for your continued support.

Maria

--

Maria Brewer

Director of Party Affairs, Tennessee Democratic Party

# International Worker's Day
---
| May 1st commemorates the struggles of workers all over the world, their defeats and their triumphs, and marks their common destiny. As we live in a world that has increasingly valorized capital we are faced with a choice that nascent actions by teachers in West Virginia, Stop & Shop workers in Massachusetts, and organizing in newsrooms across the country lead the way on: will Labor or capital determine the course of our future?

The next president of the United States needs to take the side of Labor. They can take three preliminary steps in that direction:

\- Repeal Taft-Hartley
\- Legalize sympathy strikes

and

\- Direct the Office of Labor-Management Standards in the opposite direction from its current role as an impediment to union organizing by changing its mission to encouraging and providing assistance to labor organizing, while ensuring the integrity of the process.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | International Worker's Day | May 1st commemorates the struggles of workers all over the world, their defeats and their triumphs, and marks their common destiny. As we live in a world that has increasingly valorized capital we are faced with a choice that nascent actions by teachers in West Virginia, Stop & Shop workers in Massachusetts, and organizing in newsrooms across the country lead the way on: will Labor or capital determine the course of our future? The next president of the United States needs to take the side of Labor. They can take three preliminary steps in that direction: \- Repeal Taft-Hartley \- Legalize sympathy strikes and \- Direct the Office of Labor-Management Standards in the opposite direction from its current role as an impediment to union organizing by changing its mission to encouraging and providing assistance to labor organizing, while ensuring the integrity of the process. name: Kamala Harris
subject: I just questioned Attorney General Barr
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I just got done questioning Attorney General Bill Barr in the Judiciary Committee. He was called to testify about Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s investigation into Russian interference in our election in 2016 and his subsequent summary of that investigation. I’ll be frank: Attorney General Barr refused to answer most of my questions -- and when he did, his answers were alarming. He admitted he had never even reviewed the underlying evidence of the Mueller report, and he refused to say whether the President has ever ordered him to investigate anyone. This is unacceptable. Bill Barr is acting more like the President’s personal attorney than the Attorney General of the United States. His job is to defend the rule of law and serve the American people, not shield the President from justice. **He made something very clear today: he must resign.** **I’m running for president because the American people deserve truth and integrity from their elected leaders. That’s not what we’re getting right now. Trump's Attorney General misrepresented Mueller's findings so grotesquely -- _that Robert Mueller himself just stepped in to correct the record._

name: Team Beto
subject: Next steps for Beto’s climate plan in Englewood:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Beto just unveiled his first major policy proposal -- an ambitious plan to
tackle climate change. It’ll cost $5 trillion over 10 years and achieve
net-zero emissions by 2050, matching the target in Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez’s Green New Deal resolution. Now Beto needs your help to
spread this plan to millions of Americans.

Climate change is the greatest existential threat we face, and we’ll need
a full-scale mobilization of our economy and democracy to address it. This
is on every single one of us, and our work starts now:

We’re gearing up for a massive month of door-to-door canvasses through
May. The most effective way for huge numbers of people to get on board
with Beto’s climate plan is for them to hear about it from someone in
their community, face to face.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-climate-canvass-host/?source=ema20190501-29307&t=1001&akid=29307%2E444211%2ErIBmvq ]Are you interested in leading a climate canvass for Beto in
Englewood? Add your name to receive our handy guides and training
details, and an organizer will reach out to make sure you’re good to go.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-climate-canvass-host/?source=ema20190501-29307&t=1002&akid=29307%2E444211%2ErIBmvq ]Yes, add my name

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190501-29307&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=29307%2E444211%2ErIBmvq ]No, but I can donate instead

We want to reach as many people with the plan this May, but we can’t do it
without volunteers like you stepping up to lead canvasses. Leading a
canvass isn’t hard: you’ll meet up with other volunteers, read the
training script and print materials for them, and head out to knock on
doors together.

Look, when Beto asked people what issues were most important, climate
change was one of the top concerns. Beto’s plan is big. It’s bold. And if
we’re able to tell enough people about it in the next month, we’ll be well
on our way to building the broad support we need to win the White House
and put our plan in place, starting day one.

Imagine how good it will feel when Beto takes the most ambitious actions
of any president ever to tackle this perilous threat starting right on his

| | This deeply troubles me: The Trump administration's handling of the Mueller Report is criminal. This investigation is one of the most serious undertakings of our government in decades and it deserves integrity. Integrity, we know, is sorely lacking in the Trump administration. **Robert Mueller 's letter reveals the Trump administration seriously misrepresented his findings -- and Attorney General Barr lied about it under oath to Congress. ** [**We can accept nothing less than the Attorney General 's resignation -- or he should face impeachment. >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd63/3eb3e2fc/4d087d31/7449cc15/362233317/VEsE/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/impeach-barr?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+We+can+accept+nothing+less+than+the+Atto&utm_campaign=20190501_em_pet_impeach-barr_du&source=20190501_em_pet_impeach-barr_du") I've never witnessed a political stunt more dangerous or more disgraceful than this administration's spin on Mueller's findings. Here's what we know: \-- Donald Trump publicly and privately asked for -- and received -- assistance from the Russian government in the 2016 presidential election. \-- From his firing of the FBI director to his undermining of Robert Mueller, Donald Trump sought to conceal the truth from the American people. _**\-- And now we know that Attorney General William Barr attempted to deceive the American people and lied under oath to Congress. **_ [**Today 's Senate hearings made clear: Attorney General Barr will not uphold the Constitution, and will not resign voluntarily. So I'm calling on Congress to begin impeachment hearings. Will you sign my petition? >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd63/3eb3e2fc/4d087d31/7449cc14/362233317/VEsF/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/impeach-barr?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Todayrsquos+Senate+hearings+made+clear+A&utm_campaign=20190501_em_pet_impeach-barr_du&source=20190501_em_pet_impeach-barr_du") We must take this seriously. Our democracy depends on it. Thank you,

body:
“Juan Guaido indeed is the duly elected constitutional leader” of Venezuela, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo said today. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cdb9959b2f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 1, 2019
---
| | |
# **A message to all patriotic citizens of Venezuela**

**“Juan Guaido** indeed is the duly elected constitutional leader” of Venezuela, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo said today. “Our task is to continue to support all those who are supporting Juan Guaido.”

**Over the past 36 hours** —and, indeed, for months before—President Donald J. Trump, Secretary Pompeo, and National Security Advisor John Bolton have reiterated America’s support for Interim President Guaido and the Venezuelan people in their struggle to replace socialist dictatorship with democracy. That support for a peaceful transition of power will continue.
🎬 **Watch:** [A message to all patriotic citizens of Venezuela](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acb7fe7b0b&e=3ee4985eea)
**Socialism in Venezuela** has collapsed its economy. “Just as one example, when Chavez took power 20 years ago, Venezuela was pumping around 3.3 million barrels of oil a day,” Ambassador Bolton said this morning. “A few months ago they were down to 1.1 million.” While poverty levels multiply, the Maduro regime has denied Venezuelans badly needed food and medical aid, causing millions to flee the country.

**Yesterday,** the regime showed its true colors again as it met peaceful protestors with tear gas, gunfire, water cannons, and armored cars deployed as lethal weapons.

**_The Washington Post_** editorial board [called out those](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1d9953b68&e=3ee4985eea)—including some in the American media—who referred to President Guaido’s movement as a “coup attempt.” That language echoes the Maduro dictatorship’s propaganda. In reality, President Guaido was duly elevated by Venezuela’s National Assembly and has pledged to restore free and fair elections once Maduro is removed.

**That isn't a coup.** It's the triumph of real democracy over a violent dictatorship with no legitimate claim to power.

**Outside forces** must stop working to oppress the citizens of Venezuela by propping up Maduro and his thugs. If Cuba and Russia do not leave Venezuela, Secretary Pompeo says, they will face economic sanctions and other consequences.

**“The coup here** has been by the Cubans and the Russians.”

[Something to share: President Guaido bravely leads—while Maduro hides](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e05a0a4591&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: 2018 NASCAR champion pays a visit**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6defba15c2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Yesterday,** **President Trump** welcomed 2018 NASCAR Cup Series winner Joey Logano and Team Penske to the White House. With Joey’s no. 22 race car parked on the driveway of the South Lawn, the President congratulated the 28-year old champion.

**“NASCAR is not only** a thrilling display of skill and power but a celebration of the American spirit,” President Trump said. “No matter who wins the race, you never forget what matters most: God, family, and country."

name: Alyssa Milano
subject: I'm fighting for the Equal Rights Amendment. So is Joe Biden. Are you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4b/1cd0ac28/30f2c198/356bedc6/754426934/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter,

My name is Alyssa Milano and I do not have equal rights under the law.

Why? **Because I am a woman, and there is no constitutional amendment guaranteed to protect me.**

That's why we must ratify the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA), which states that "Women shall have equal rights in the United States and every place subject to its jurisdiction. Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of sex."

Thankfully, Congress held a hearing on the ERA yesterday -- the first in 36 years. [This is a huge step, Peter, but it's the first of many before we see the ERA ratified. We need to keep pushing if we want to truly achieve equal rights.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4b/1cd0ac28/30f2c198/356bedc5/754426934/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/ERA?source=email-bsd-20190501era-b2_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190501era&utm_content=b2_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

That's why I'm writing today, on behalf of my friend Joe Biden, to ask you to sign your name with Joe and me to show your support for the ERA.

**Will you sign your name, Peter? You can do that here:** | | [**SIGN MY NAME >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4b/1cd0ac28/30f2c198/356bedc5/754426934/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/ERA?source=email-bsd-20190501era-b2_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190501era&utm_content=b2_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")
---
Joe realizes how important it is for us to speak up on this issue and not be complacent in the fight for equality.
* He has been a leader in the fight for the Equal Rights Amendment and reintroduced it in the Senate.
* He wrote and spearheaded the Violence Against Women Act, when sexual violence was considered a family matter.
* He brought the issue of campus sexual assault front and center and created a White House task force to develop resources for survivors.
* He fought with President Obama to pass the Paycheck Fairness Act and the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act.

And, he's continuing to fight for constitutional equality for women.

Joe and I are working hard to make sure this issue stays front and center. Getting the word out is the first step.

**So Peter, I 'm aiming for 50,000 signers on Joe's petition in support of the Equal Rights Amendment. Can you be one of them, Peter?**
| [**SIGN MY NAME >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b4b/1cd0ac28/30f2c198/356bedc5/754426934/VEsC/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/ERA?source=email-bsd-20190501era-b2_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190501era&utm_content=b2_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

Thanks for reading. Yours in the fight,

Alyssa Milano
